entry.title: Updated: Combobox pattern
entry.summary: The Combobox pattern documentation has been updated with new guidance for inline autocomplete behavior and keyboard-interaction expectations in the list popup.

entry.title: New: Skip Link pattern
entry.summary: A new Skip Link pattern has been added to the WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices, documenting best practices for bypass-navigation affordances.

entry.title: Reading ARIA reference documentation
entry.summary: Guidance on how to read the ARIA specification alongside the Authoring Practices, including how to resolve apparent conflicts between normative and advisory content.
